questionHtml:
The children in a family have blood groups A, B and O. What are the genotypes of their parents?

A. IAIA and IBi

B. IAi and IBi

C. IAIB and ii

D. IAIB and IBi

meta.title: The children in a family have blood groups A, B and O. What are the genotypes of their parents? A. IAIA and IBi B. IAi and IBi C. IAIB and ii D. IAIB and IBi
